# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We currently support the following versions of SopKit with security updates:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of SopKit seriously. If you find a security vulnerability, please do not open a public issue. Instead, please report it via the following process:

1. Email the maintainer at [shaswatraj3@gmail.com](mailto:shaswatraj3@gmail.com).
2. Provide a detailed description of the vulnerability and steps to reproduce it.
3. We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and provide a timeline for a fix.

Thank you for helping keep SopKit safe for everyone!
